# Copilot Instructions

This repo maintains the Harness Engineering Bootstrap template. Treat template changes as high leverage because consuming repositories may copy the pattern.

Before reviewing or editing:

- Read `AGENTS.md`.
- Read `docs/dogfooding.md` for the anti-bloat admission test.
- Open `templates/Harness Engineering Bootstrap.md` only when the task touches the template.

Reject changes that add broad always-on guidance, duplicate canonical instructions, or expand optional template guidance without trigger evidence, a smaller-control check, validation, and a retirement or revisit rule.
